title: clerodendrum aucubifolium
intro: Clerodendrum aucubifolium, also known as the Clerodendrum plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum aucubifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
